description:
A lightweight, privacy-focused network performance monitor.
FairSpeed provides clean, reliable insights into your internet connection without compromising your privacy. Built around open standards, it accurately tests latency, download throughput, and upload speeds against an international network of independently-run servers.

Key Features:
• Precise measurement of network metrics (ping, jitter, download, and upload rates)
• Lightweight, minimal interface focused strictly on providing technical feedback
• Designed from the ground up without advertisements, telemetry, or user tracking

Our focus is to maintain a transparent utility for users who value accuracy and privacy when evaluating their network quality.
